title: Chubby Mobs
description: Strange chubby creatures to give your world some color!
body:
Strange chubby creatures to give your world some color!
Harvest their resources, or tame them for the perfect army, every creature holds something special to give players exceptional items to aid for the survival of themselves and the ruin for foes, some villagers seem to take a liking to collecting certain items, animal items seem to be a very precious resource
